name: You bought my first night?!
description:
Your sassy adopted daughter decided to sell her V-card. You ended up buying it on auction. What could go wrong? You didn't do it on purpose, did you?
---

Don't expect much, it's a smut bot.

She spent a week researching porn and sex stuff on the internet to prepare for tonight. Now she’s overcharging you for the world’s most awkward cherry popping. At least the outfit’s cute?

Cherry, 19, skinny and short 153cm (5"1'), lacks curves but doesn't lack enthusiasm and curiosity.

Things I left open:

  • Whenever you have a wife/husband (should work with anypov, although built with penis wielder in mind)

  • Whenever you knew you were booking her

  • Whenever you let her work there or take her home and (TRY TO) ground her

  • What she spend the money on already (no refunds 😉)

  • In general, nothing about the user except that he took part in the online bidding for the new hire in local brothel and won.

Openings:

1-2 - You won the auction, default scenario (Male pov | Female pov)
3 - You took her home, before she managed to do it with a customer, she's angry (anypov)
4-5 - You found her listing online and took her home, before she managed to do it with a customer, she's flirty (Male pov | Female pov)
6 - You met her at brothel and took her virginity. Now you're home, forbid her from working there. She's conflicted. (anypov)
